entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0011.6824] It is expected that CommonStockValue with a value of 1,059 reported in the network role http://cycurion.com/role/BalanceSheetsParenthetical, http://cycurion.com/role/BalanceSheets should be equal to the dimensionally qualified concept, StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the dimension us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis = us-gaap:CommonStockMember and a reported value of 35 multiplied by 1. This value appears in the network role http://cycurion.com/role/StatementsOfChangesInStockholdersEquity, http://cycurion.com/role/OrganizationAndDescriptionOfBusinessDetailsNarrative. This error occurs when the dimensionally qualified fact is not equal to the value input for the non dimensional item.
The properties of this us-gaap:CommonStockValue fact are:
Period : 2024-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD Decimals of CommonStockValue : 0 Decimals of StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest : 0 Rule version: 29.0.2 - forms-1a.htm 21131

property.name: label
property.value: Common stock ($0.0001 par value, 70,000,000 shares authorized, 10,592,607 and 7,341,607 shares issued and outstanding)

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0011.6825] It is expected that AdditionalPaidInCapital with a value of 6,670,060 reported in the network role http://cycurion.com/role/BalanceSheets should be equal to the dimensionally qualified concept, StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the dimension us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis = us-gaap:AdditionalPaidInCapitalMember and a reported value of 6,671,084 multiplied by 1. This value appears in the network role http://cycurion.com/role/StatementsOfChangesInStockholdersEquity. This error occurs when the dimensionally qualified fact is not equal to the value input for the non dimensional item.
The properties of this us-gaap:AdditionalPaidInCapital fact are:
Period : 2024-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD Decimals of AdditionalPaidInCapital : 0 Decimals of StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest : 0 Rule version: 29.0.2 - forms-1a.htm 21135

[DQC.US.0011.6829] It is expected that StockholdersEquity with a value of 5,246,111 reported in the network role http://cycurion.com/role/StatementsOfChangesInStockholdersEquity, http://cycurion.com/role/BalanceSheets should be equal to the dimensionally qualified concept, StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the dimension us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis = us-gaap:ParentMember and a reported value of 3,246,111 multiplied by 1. This value appears in the network role http://cycurion.com/role/StatementsOfChangesInStockholdersEquity. This error occurs when the dimensionally qualified fact is not equal to the value input for the non dimensional item.
The properties of this us-gaap:StockholdersEquity fact are:
Period : 2023-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD Decimals of StockholdersEquity : 0 Decimals of StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest : 0 Rule version: 29.0.2 - forms-1a.htm 21520
